creator: urtp5@yandex.by
text:
(In reply to qjail from comment #1)
Thanks for answer!

Just for my information, is it forced check somewhere in qjail code to disable using it on -CURRENT?

For example, on 13-STABLE (updated with make buildworld ......) qjail worked on several machines. So it is works not only on -RELEASE, but on -STABLE also, and thats why I answer about forced checks in its code for preventing using it on -CURRENT.
